canonical_definition: A medical multiple-choice question benchmark sourced from the National Board of Medical Examiners, containing clinical vignettes and knowledge-based questions used to evaluate LLM performance on human medical licensing exam content.
papers: Geometric Signatures of Compositionality Across a Language Model’s Lifetime
Learning to Reason Over Time: Timeline Self-Reflection for Improved Temporal Reasoning in Language Models

definitions.text: A medical multiple-choice question benchmark sourced from the National Board of Medical Examiners, containing clinical vignettes and knowledge-based questions used to evaluate LLM performance on human medical licensing exam content.
definitions.paper: Geometric Signatures of Compositionality Across a Language Model’s Lifetime

definitions.text: A challenging question answering dataset containing multiple-choice questions from the United States Medical Licensing Examination (USMLE).
definitions.paper: Learning to Reason Over Time: Timeline Self-Reflection for Improved Temporal Reasoning in Language Models

relationships.paper: KnowGPT: Knowledge Graph based Prompting for Large Language Models
